ab: naadasun ku kamu aip tu hanian kusia ludun.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: tupa cina tu supah langkitaz sia ludun cia.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: na adasus masnanava kamu aip tu hanian ku sia huma.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: na kudita masuhaz aupas dalah?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: na kusia kata aip tu hanian?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: na adasun katas masnanava kuvahlas cia.
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: na ku isa kata aip tu hanian?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: na adasun katas masnanava kusia ludun cia.
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: adu na kuvahlas cia kata aip tu hanian?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: ni, na adasun tas masnanava cia kusia ludun.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: adu na kusianta aip tu hanian sia ludun cia?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: ni, na kusian ta aip tu hanian sia bangkal cia.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: masnanava, na maz saduanta sia vahlas cia?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: na sadutas salinghanuaz.
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: masnanava na maz saduanta sia ludun cia?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: na sadutas balikuan.
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: na mapikua ta sia bangkal cia?
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: na ku sian ta bangkal cia sadus imita sinsuaz tu acipul, mananuluai aiza iahlulua mas vanu!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: masnanava adu na kusianta vahlas cia sunghahaul?
ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: ni, na masivitas salinghanuaz.
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: masnanava adu na kusianta bangkal masuaz sanglav?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: na kudita aip tu hanian masuhaz dalah.
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: aiza udipa salinghanuaz kusbabai.
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: sinaduik aip tu hanian mas mamantuk mihumisang tu salinghanuaz.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: aiza udip a balikuan kusbabai.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ie! mazima saikis balikuan aupa manau-uaz.
ch: B:耶! 哇! 我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: aiza udipa balikuan kusbabai.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: ni saia balikuan saia hai vanu.
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: isainacin sadu, kakatu kudahvian cia hai!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: ung, na ni kaimin ku dahvian.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: kakatu cisdadan mudaukdauk a madadan i na ciskapat.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: asa saikin maaipi u-saduan.
en: I want to see them right away.
